_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v10 FINAL: Only SFT-viable games. gin_rummy 1484 (bot vs random, proven 42% eval), goofspiel 480 (GPU bot vs random, 96% win), leduc_poker 296 (GPU bot vs MCTS 3000sim, 50% win). Zero-score games (liars_dice/othello/hex/clobber/gin_rummy) → GRPO. gin_rummy kept because existing vs random data already scores 42%.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-21: v10 final. GPU-verified goofspiel+leduc + preserved gin_rummy. Total 2260.

NAVWORLD.v5_fixes: transport format (Chinese text), Chinese prompts/schema, scorer keyword alignment, D1/D2 label fix
NAVWORLD.notes: V5 1531 entries. Growing past 1500 to match v2.7 NW ratio (~26%). Target 1700. Proxy recovering (~60% success on good batches).
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-22 loop7: +31 (9 intercity, 14 single_poi, 2 food_tour, 6 multiday). 1531 total. Proxy improved.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 79 trajectories (Go 75, Ruby 3, Rust 1). Go v5: 79/400 (27 ok, 63%). gitea series. 21 to 100.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-22: Go v5 steady. 27/43 actual = 63%. HF synced 79.

LIVEWEB.notes: 670 entries. Session: +142 net (528→670). HN r3 +18. All fit seq=8192. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-22: HN gen r3 22/40 (18 valid). Total 670. v2.11 training 18% on m2.
